examples: Media reports said Meng studied computers at Algonquin College.
We met in Algonquin Park, Ontario, Canada when we were counselors at summer camps there.
A police report said the missing men were studying at Algonquin and Carleton University.
Algonquin is a small company that likes to discover and develop a few smart books.
The best place to have a drink at the Algonquin Hotel is in the lobby.
